productDisplayName: Doodle Girl's Halter Neck Pink Kidswear
description: CompositionBaby pink halter neck top with tie-up strings, made of 100% cotton with sequinned print on the chest, and softly elasticated at the back and at the hemline for a snug FitFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycleDo not bleachTumble dry low or lay flat to dryWarm iron when neededDo not iron on printIndulge your little girl in a world of fantasy with this pink top from doodle. The soft cotton fabric and spray of sequins on the chest create a world of magic, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Team this halter top with a white skirt and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies.
